reasoning: The limiter we need to address is your lactate clearance, as highlighted by the 9.3% decline in your power curve between 5 and 20 minutes. Your last ride at 71% FTP indicates a solid foundation, but tackling underdeveloped aerobic base is crucial for the Alpine Loop, especially for the sustained 8.5-mile climb. By targeting over-unders, we'll simulate the demands of the Cascade Springs segment, improving your climbing efficiency.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 6-minute intervals: 2 minutes at 218W, 2 minutes at 256W, 2 minutes at 218W. Short rest between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
